ground_truth.title: Intelligent analytics services
ground_truth.main_content:
Develop cutting-edge insights, generate data-fueled intelligence, and build brand value with our global team of data scientists and analytics experts.

Optimize business outcomes with AI-fueled analytics solutions 
Our clients see measurable growth in acquisition, retention, and efficiency through our connected data and tech-led approach. We help brands evolve and innovate in these areas:
- Acquisition
- Retention & Extension
- Persona Creation
- Segmentation
- Predictive Modeling
- Marketing Efficiency
- Measurement  
- Experimentation

Powered by connected identity and data
Acxiom’s Real ID is embedded within the adtech and martech ecosystems as well as all major marketing clouds, offers unparalleled scale, accuracy, and flexibility. Our analytics solutions are fueled by industry leading consumer data across 2.6 billion global consumers, with over 10k+ unique attributes to deliver more meaningful customer insights.

Results:
- $43 million in incremental revenue driving additional visits for a restaurant chain
- 51% conversion lift for a retail TV ad campaign
- $75 million in revenue recovered to reactivate lapsed card holders for a credit card issuer
- 15% savings in marketing spend through multi-touch attribution for a financial institution
- 40 million record increase in addressable market size defining their ideal customer for a utility company

Faster, better decisions
Accelerate growth through sharper customer insights, AI-powered optimization, and actionable performance intelligence.

Four ways to build analytics acumen 
Growth & Performance Analytics
Analyses and reports to find audiences, inform strategy, and grow business 
Audience Analytics
Identify, build, and model audiences to meet brand objectives effectively and efficiently​ 
Data Science
Gather and analyze campaign performance data to identify areas of improvement (AI/ML)
Data Management & Visualization
Design and scale data and analysis outputs for integrating, cleansing, and governing data 

Case Study: Healthcare payer saves $6M by retaining at-risk members 
Acxiom’s predictive retention model ranked members by risk level, enabling proactive outreach to those at highest risk for attrition and achieving over 200% in marketing ROI.

Test, learn, and make data-driven decisions   
Acxiom makes it easy to refine your models and approaches based on evolving consumer behavior, market conditions, and business goals, so you can make better decisions at each stage of the marketing funnel and accelerate innovation and product development.   

Full-funnel marketing analytics 
Acxiom provides solutions that leverage data and analytics to improve customer acquisition, retention, and growth strategies, including MMM and MTA. From developing look-alike audiences to identifying churn indicators and providing detailed segmentation, we help brands stand out from the competition.  

Insights derived from first-party data 
With access to unified data, tools and global talent, we deliver better, faster planning and insights that help marketers understand and cater to their customers. From customer journey to lifetime value analysis, we are experts in leveraging a brand’s first-party data to drive marketing optimization and deepen customer relationships.  

Solve your toughest analytics challenges
with: Develop cutting-edge insights, generate data-fueled intelligence, and build brand value with our global team of data scientists and analytics experts.
Optimize business outcomes with AI-fueled analytics solutions
Acxiom’s Real ID is embedded within the adtech and martech ecosystems as well as all major marketing clouds, offers unparalleled scale, accuracy, and flexibility.
Four ways to build analytics acumen: Growth & Performance Analytics, Audience Analytics, Data Science, and Data Management & Visualization.
